summarySection.summary: Full-stack engineer with a proven track record in building scalable web applications and APIs using React and PostgreSQL. Experienced in developing customer-centric solutions and collaborating effectively in technical environments.

experience.description:
• Developed and maintained robust backend services and REST APIs using Python and Django, streamlining secure workflows for financial compliance.
• Collaborated with senior engineers to design scalable architectures, enhancing system performance and data modeling.
• Created dynamic React dashboards that integrated with Django APIs, significantly improving operational visibility and data insights.
• Optimized data-processing pipelines and PostgreSQL queries, achieving a ~40% reduction in latency and enhancing system scalability.

projects.description:
• Engineered a full-stack finance application that automates account aggregation and transaction tracking, providing users with comprehensive spending insights.
• Developed FastAPI services and PostgreSQL schemas for seamless Plaid integrations, ensuring reliable transaction processing and data normalization.
• Designed responsive React dashboards and secure authentication flows, enhancing user experience in financial management.
• Implemented OAuth/JWT for secure data handling, safeguarding user access to sensitive financial information.

• Created an AI-driven resume platform that automates the parsing of PDF/DOCX files into structured, editable profiles.
• Built backend services for parsing and authentication workflows using FastAPI and PostgreSQL, ensuring efficient data handling.
• Developed a real-time editing interface in React, allowing users to customize their resumes seamlessly.
• Integrated OpenAI API for enhanced content generation, streamlining the resume extraction and editing process.

warnings: Skills guard restored 6 skill row(s) because Pass B exceeded the deletion budget.
